name: Heilongjiang Interchina Water Treatment Co.,Ltd.
summary: Heilongjiang Interchina Water Treatment Co.,Ltd. engages in the construction and operation of water project in China. The company is involved in the purification and supply of water. It also offers sewage treatment, drainage integration, engineering, and technical services. In addition, the company provides green sustainable energy and project construction services. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
